bolt.directive: Maintain performance baseline. Await further architectural changes before optimization.

palette.directive: Ensure journal logs remain clear and accessible for restricted services (neos-autoupdate.service, neos-liveuser-setup.service) to prevent debugging issues due to missing permissions.

sentinel.directive: Audit systemd sandboxing directives in neos-autoupdate.service and neos-liveuser-setup.service. Ensure no critical privileges are granted unnecessarily. Verify ReadWritePaths are strictly minimal.
